regional_cost_note: Builders in Invercargill typically charge $70–$100/hr. New build costs range $2,400–$3,500/m². Southland’s competitive market offers some of NZ’s best value for residential construction.

businesses.name: Buildhub
businesses.known_for: Building consultants and brokers offering project management through to fence construction, earthworks, and handyman services across Southland and Central Otago.

businesses.name: Dion Bates Building Ltd
businesses.known_for: Residential building contractor covering new homes, renovations, tiling, fencing, kitchens, bathrooms, foundations, and roofing across Southland, Southern Lakes, and Central Otago.

businesses.name: Landon North Building
businesses.known_for: Qualified carpenter specialising in home renovations, kitchens, bathrooms, roofing, concrete work, and new construction across the Invercargill region.

businesses.name: Bang Bang Building Ltd
businesses.known_for: Residential builder serving Southland specialising in kitchens & bathrooms, roofing, and general renovations.
